steps.targetDesc: The thin bar of icons pinned along the bottom edge of the screen
steps.why: The Dock is the fastest launcher for pinned apps
steps.pitfall: If the Dock is hidden, move your cursor to the very bottom edge of the screen to reveal it

steps.targetDesc: A circular blue compass icon with a red-and-white needle, typically near the left side of the Dock
steps.why: Visually confirming the correct icon prevents launching the wrong browser
steps.pitfall: Don't confuse it with Chrome (colorful circle) or Firefox (orange fox)

steps.targetDesc: Single left-click on the blue compass Dock icon
steps.expectedState: Safari icon bounces and a dot appears beneath it, then the Safari window opens
steps.why: A single click is all that's needed to launch a Dock-pinned app
steps.pitfall: Double-clicking is unnecessary and may open two windows
